content.en:
In the core area near the Holy Dao Monument, one of the half-step Yae Ancestors was practicing.

At this moment, the Yuan Dao aura on his body changed suddenly.

At this time, the other half-step Yae Ancestors sensed it and looked at it one by one.

"This half-step Yae Origin Ancestor is about to comprehend the Extreme Path!!"

"He's not the Dao Ancestor of our Hanhai District Boundary, I don't know which Continent Realm he comes from?"

"I know him, the Illusory Dao Ancestor from the Bohai District Realm, he is very famous in the Bohai District Realm, and he has comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and his strength is no less than the weaker Eightfold Origin Ancestor, and now he has comprehended the Extreme Ninefold Yuan Dao, even if he does not break through to the Eightfold Ancestor, he can easily defeat the weaker Eightfold Ancestor. When he steps into the realm of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, his strength is afraid that it is comparable to the powerful Eightfold Origin Ancestor!"

"No wonder his Yuan Dao aura is so terrifying, it turns out to be a Ninefold Yuan Dao!"

"I'm really envious, with the Ninefold Yuan Dao breakthrough as the Eightfold Ancestor, the future potential is unlimited!"

These half-step eightfold ancestors were all envious, in their opinion, the Ninefold Yuan Dao was indeed very powerful, but it was also more difficult for the Ninefold Yuan Dao to comprehend the extreme realm.

In terms of probability, the chances of a Dao Ancestor who comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao becoming an Eightfold Origin Ancestor were similar to those of other Dao Ancestors.

Of course, being able to comprehend the Ninefold Yuan Dao means that the talent is very demonic, so as long as it does not fall, most of them can become half-step Eightfold Ancestors.

And the Dao Ancestor who comprehended the Sevenfold Yuan Dao and the Eightfold Yuan Dao had a little worse foundation potential, so it was extremely difficult to become a half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor.

But as long as you become a half-step Eightfold Ancestor, the potential will not be bad, and everyone's hopes of becoming an Eightfold Ancestor are similar.

As for whether you can break through, it depends not only on time, but also on chance, understanding, and background.

And among the many regional boundaries, I don't know how many Dao Ancestors who have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, but have not been able to break through to the Eightfold Origin Ancestor.

It's like the Hanhai District Boundary, why are there so many half-step eightfold ancestors who have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao leaving the Hanhai District Boundary and going to other regional boundaries?

It's not because it's too difficult to raise the Ninefold Yuan Dao to the extreme realm, so you have to look for opportunities one by one, so as to pursue that extremely low probability.

The original Black Silence Dao Ancestor, why did he take the risk of devouring countless Dao Ancestors, it was also for that glimmer of opportunity.

There are too many half-step Yae Ancestors, but there are too few that can break through.

Therefore, this Dao Ancestor comprehended the Extreme Extreme Dao, and the other half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestors were so envious!

......

"The Illusory Dao Ancestor has comprehended the Extreme Extreme Dao, and when he goes back, he only needs to create a Supreme Yuan Dao Control Technique, and he can attack the Eightfold Origin Ancestor!"

Saint Ape Dao Ancestor smiled.

For the half-step Eightfold Ancestor who had comprehended the Extreme Yuan Dao, it was not difficult to create a Supreme Yuan Dao Control Technique.

Therefore, it won't be long before the Illusory Dao Ancestor becomes the Eightfold Origin Ancestor.

At this time, another Eightfold Origin Ancestor said: "Illusory Dao Ancestor, I know him, he himself is extremely close to comprehending the Extreme Yuan Dao, this time I can comprehend the Extreme Yuan Dao with the help of the Holy Dao Monument, it is not surprising to me." "

Time passed, and it didn't take long for the Illusory Dao Ancestor to leave here.

After all, he had already received the Extreme Yuan Dao, and it was not necessary to use the Holy Dao Monument to comprehend, and a half-step eightfold ancestor like him was already a faint threat to the Holy Dao Monument.

Therefore, the Illusory Dao Ancestor directly chose to leave.

......

Another period of time has passed, and many Dao Ancestors have been here for a long time.

During this period, there were constantly Dao ancestors who made progress in the Yuan Dao.

Some are promoted from the beginning to the small success, some are from the small success to the big success, and some are from the big success to the perfect state.

And after they break through, they will all advance a certain distance, so that the imp who has attained enlightenment will be better.

It's just that these Dao Ancestors who can make breakthroughs are not far from the breakthrough, so they can complete the breakthrough.

In the case of Ye Tian, that cannot be replicated.

Time flies, Ye Tian is constantly contemplating, and the Yuan Dao has gradually improved to the peak realm of Xiaocheng, and it is getting closer and closer to the Dacheng-level Endless Yuan Dao.

And the Holy Dao Monument has absorbed enough Hanhai District Boundary Origin, and it is not far from leaving here.

One by one, the top forces calculated and locked the time when the Holy Dao Monument left.

"Tell them, there are five thousand Origin Domain Era left at the earliest, and the Holy Dao Monument is about to leave!"

An eightfold ancestor reminded.

Anyway, once this deadline is passed, the battle will break out at any time.

At that time, some Dao Ancestors have not left, so it is none of their business, and if they are really affected and killed, it can only mean that they themselves have died.

In the blink of an eye, more than 3,000 years of the Origin Era have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Endless Yuan Dao finally ushered in a big breakthrough again.

"Dacheng level!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

He didn't expect that he would comprehend the Endless Yuan Dao to the Dacheng level so quickly, and the next step would be the Consummation Realm!

The Yuan Dao realm of those half-step eightfold primordial ancestors is only in the consummation realm, and the Yuan Dao realm of many sevenfold primordial ancestors is only in the Dacheng realm.

And some of the weaker Sevenfold Origin Ancestor peak powerhouses, the Yuan Dao realm may not have reached the Dacheng realm!

Don't talk about cultivation, only talk about the Yuan Dao realm, he is already comparable to the powerhouse of the peak realm of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor!

When the Ninefold Yuan Dao reached the Dacheng realm, Ye Tian was not in a hurry, and how much he could improve next was earned.

In the blink of an eye, more than two thousand Primordial Era had passed.

"Let's go, we can't participate in enlightenment and cultivation anymore, there will be a battle here at any time, we have to go back!"

Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor summoned Ye Tian and the others to the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor, and immediately ignored Ye Tian's opinion. Directly took Ye Tian and they left here.

Whoa!!

One by one, the half-step eightfold ancestor and the sevenfold ancestor quickly escaped.

And some half-step sevenfold ancestors who didn't know why, thought about it, and left.

Although the effect of participating in the Yuan Dao here is very good, but those Dao Ancestors of the big forces have all run away, where do they dare to stay here!

Dao Ancestors who can cultivate to the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor are not stupid, so they will not die casually.

In the blink of an eye, there was no Dao Ancestor here!

"These guys aren't stupid!"

The Holy Ape Dao Ancestor muttered.

He thought there were a few fools who would continue to stay here!

It was rare, but he did.

At this time.

Outside the Holy Dao Monument Dao Domain, there are only some Eightfold Origin Ancestors left, and they will make a move at any time, not necessarily waiting for the Holy Dao Monument to leave.

......

Xuanyu Pavilion headquarters.

It is located at the junction of the boundary of the Hanhai region and another regional boundary, which is called the Hanhai Wind Belt.

Soon, Ye Tian and Xuan Huang Daozu and others came here.
